changes.value:
Wire up init/deinit in shelltool-cli using InitRegistry.

## Registry components
1. ShelltoolMcpRegistration (priority 10) — register shelltool MCP server via mirdan::mcp_config with command: "shelltool", args: ["serve"]
2. ShellExecuteTool (priority 20) — config + deny Bash + deploy skill (from the real Initializable impl)

## Commands
- `shelltool init [project|local|user]` — runs registry init
- `shelltool deinit [project|local|user]` — runs registry deinit (reverse order)

## Files
- shelltool-cli/src/main.rs (dispatch)
- shelltool-cli/src/cli.rs (InstallTarget enum or reuse InitScope)

## Acceptance
- `shelltool init` registers MCP server, creates .shell/config.yaml, denies Bash, deploys shell skill
- `shelltool deinit` reverses all
- Idempotent
